title: Tolvi pattern frontmatter
description: Frontmatter schema for files in vault/patterns/. Patterns are intentionally timeless - no date or repo required.

tags.description: Tags describing the pattern. The first tag SHOULD be 'pattern'. Case-sensitive; no duplicates.

languages.description: Optional list of programming languages this pattern applies to.

frameworks.description: Optional list of frameworks/libraries this pattern applies to.
